text: Bravo Six going dark
tango down secure the perimeter
LZ is hot I repeat the landing zone is hot
all units hold position until we get confirmation
breach and clear on my mark
hostile contacts bearing two-seven-zero moving fast
we have eyes on the objective awaiting your orders
echo team this is Alpha Six do you copy
target is down moving to extraction now
we are Oscar Mike to the extraction point
friendlies are pinned down at grid reference five-five-niner
air support is three minutes out hold your position
intel confirms the package is inside the building
going weapons free on my mark do not hesitate
establish a perimeter and wait for my signal
this is a direct action mission failure is not an option
the mission briefing is classified need to know only
recon reports enemy reinforcements moving in from the north
we go in quiet take out the sentries before they raise the alarm
rules of engagement are weapons free on confirmed hostiles only
satellite imagery shows two guards on the roof rotate every four minutes
our window is narrow once we breach we do not stop moving
stack up on the door and wait for my count
exfil is at zero-dark-thirty do not be late
command wants the target alive so watch your fire
we have one shot at this do not blow our cover
radio silence from this point on until we reach the objective
stay frosty and keep your head down we move at oh-two-hundred
the intelligence suggests heavy resistance expect a full squad inside
this ends tonight one way or another let us move out
